waves_executed.label: regression_proof
changes: Added autocomplete probe: 'QA' present after item creation
Added soft-delete probe: 'QA' still present after soft-delete (Option B assertion)
Added _run_parser_department_unit_tests() with accept/reject cases for _looks_like_department and _extract_department_from_row_cells

residual_risks: No real PDF fixture documents are present in samples/regression/cases.json; parser proof covers only in-memory row/method unit tests.
The _looks_like_department heuristic uses a suffix pattern; unusual department names without standard suffixes (e.g. very short abbreviations) would still return empty rather than a false positive.
